channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: The Parade of Presidents has been going since 1976. Meet the woman who keeps it going
item.description: On the main street of Cuba City, Wisc., there's a Parade of Presidents, with decorative shields for each President, begun as a bicentennial project in 1976. Donna Rogers keeps it all going.
item.content:encoded: On the main street of Cuba City, Wisc., there's a Parade of Presidents, with decorative shields for each President, begun as a bicentennial project in 1976. Donna Rogers keeps it all going.
item.dc:creator: Susan Bence

item.title: Kerrville locals mark first anniversary of catastrophic flood in central Texas
item.description: Residents from Kerrville mark the somber first anniversary of the catastrophic flood that brought death and destruction to communities along the Guadalupe River in central Texas.
item.content:encoded: Residents from Kerrville mark the somber first anniversary of the catastrophic flood that brought death and destruction to communities along the Guadalupe River in central Texas.
item.dc:creator: Sarah K. Grunau

item.title: Courts have protected states' rights to manage elections, despite Trump's efforts
item.description: Federal courts have largely afforded President Trump broader executive authority, except on the question of managing elections.
item.content:encoded: Federal courts have largely afforded President Trump broader executive authority, except on the question of managing elections.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Lopez

item.title: Remembering the American tradition of reckless abandon on the night before July Fourth
item.description: Bonfires were a regular part of life in early U.S. history. Before the wide adoption of municipal firework displays, these giant fires, some many stories high, were common.
item.content:encoded: Bonfires were a regular part of life in early U.S. history. Before the wide adoption of municipal firework displays, these giant fires, some many stories high, were common.
item.dc:creator: Matt Ozug

item.title: Iran plans massive funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei after war death
item.description: Iran is preparing a delayed, massive funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. While the government stages it as a show of force, citizens remain deeply divided over his legacy.
item.content:encoded: Iran is preparing a delayed, massive funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. While the government stages it as a show of force, citizens remain deeply divided over his legacy.
item.dc:creator: Hadeel Al-Shalchi

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are confirmed to be getting married at MSG tonight
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are expected to tie the knot Friday night. We'll tell you how things are looking around Madison Square Garden, the venue where the nuptials are set to take place.
item.content:encoded: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are expected to tie the knot Friday night. We'll tell you how things are looking around Madison Square Garden, the venue where the nuptials are set to take place.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mann

item.title: Iran's control of the Strait of Hormuz remains a powerful bargaining chip
item.description: Despite efforts by U.S. negotiators, Iran says it wants to charge a toll for ships to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. It's yet another unresolved issue of the U.S.-Iran war.
item.content:encoded: Despite efforts by U.S. negotiators, Iran says it wants to charge a toll for ships to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. It's yet another unresolved issue of the U.S.-Iran war.
item.dc:creator: Aya Batrawy

item.title: How air conditioning has changed in Portland since 2021's heat dome
item.description: In 2021, a devastating heat wave blanketed the pacific northwest, smashing records. How has AC access changed since then in Portland, one of the major cities affected.
item.content:encoded: In 2021, a devastating heat wave blanketed the pacific northwest, smashing records. How has AC access changed since then in Portland, one of the major cities affected.
item.dc:creator: Monica Samayoa

item.title: Danny McBride talks about choosing to live and work in South Carolina
item.description: For Danny McBride, success in Hollywood has taken patience, hard work, and a little bit of delusion. That sense of delusion is present in the characters he portrays and in his new book of stories.
item.content:encoded: For Danny McBride, success in Hollywood has taken patience, hard work, and a little bit of delusion. That sense of delusion is present in the characters he portrays and in his new book of stories.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Martin

item.title: Venezuelan government's quake response is under fire
item.description: Venezuela's interim president defends the government's handling of the deadly earthquakes amid mounting criticism.
item.content:encoded: Venezuela's interim president defends the government's handling of the deadly earthquakes amid mounting criticism.
item.dc:creator: John Otis
